sections.title: Lunch And Dinner Menu
items: All entrees are served with a garlic knot and side salad. Combos also include a single serve fountain soda.
Gluten-free pasta is available upon request.

beef & pork meatballs, spaghetti noodles, marinara sauce, parmesan herb topping, garlic knot
